heading: Powers
label: 20906 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2090636:2102., , .Aug. 10, 1982Pub. L. 97–234, § 296 Stat. 261The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
